summary_en: 6,000,000 shares (2.67% of outstanding), ¥10,000,000,000 limit. Open-market purchase via Tokyo Stock Exchange, May 15–July 30, 2026. All acquired shares to be cancelled effective August 31, 2026. Rationale: capital efficiency and expanded shareholder returns under capital allocation policy.
title_en: Notice of Resolution on Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Cancellation of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: On May 14, 2026, Casio Computer's Board of Directors resolved to acquire up to 6,000,000 treasury shares (2.67% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) at a maximum aggregate cost of ¥10,000,000,000. Purchases will be executed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange's listed market between May 15 and July 30, 2026. All acquired shares will be cancelled effective August 31, 2026. The company states the acquisition and cancellation are undertaken in accordance with its capital allocation policy to improve capital efficiency and expand shareholder returns.
